Tracker.function: Finds what does not want to be found.

sharedSkills.name: Awareness
sharedSkills.use: Notice threats, anomalies, hidden movement, and ambush conditions.

sharedSkills.name: Investigation
sharedSkills.use: Search scenes, connect clues, and narrow entity possibilities.

sharedSkills.name: Stealth
sharedSkills.use: Move unseen, bypass notice, and establish ambush position.

sharedSkills.name: Survival
sharedSkills.use: Operate in harsh environments and read terrain or tracks.

sharedSkills.name: Endurance
sharedSkills.use: Resist fatigue, bodily stress, and cumulative pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Composure
sharedSkills.use: Resist fear, panic, and mental collapse under supernatural stress.

sharedSkills.name: Occult Knowledge
sharedSkills.use: Recognize rituals, supernatural signs, and likely weaknesses.

sharedSkills.name: Ritual Basics
sharedSkills.use: Attempt basic rituals with elevated danger and instability.

sharedSkills.name: Ritual Casting
sharedSkills.use: Perform controlled ritual work, especially for Occultists.

sharedSkills.name: Binding
sharedSkills.use: Restrict, contain, or pin down supernatural entities.

sharedSkills.name: Warding
sharedSkills.use: Create barriers, circles, protections, and anti-entity thresholds.

sharedSkills.name: Melee Combat
sharedSkills.use: Resolve close violence, control, and finishing pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Firearms
sharedSkills.use: Deliver precise ranged attacks and target weaknesses at distance.

sharedSkills.name: Tinkering
sharedSkills.use: Build traps, modify gear, and create anti-entity tools.

sharedSkills.name: Presence Sense
sharedSkills.use: Detect or classify supernatural presence.

sharedSkills.name: Spirit Communication
sharedSkills.use: Speak to spirits for information, leverage, or release.

sharedSkills.name: Insight
sharedSkills.use: Read motives, lies, emotional fractures, and hidden pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Advanced Firearms
sharedSkills.use: Advanced ranged tactics and special ammunition use.

sharedSkills.name: Dual Wielding
sharedSkills.use: Fight with paired weapons under pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Tactical Movement
sharedSkills.use: Move through danger without losing position.

sharedSkills.name: Exorcism
sharedSkills.use: Drive a possessor out through ritual procedure.

sharedSkills.name: Demon Binding
sharedSkills.use: Contain or pin infernal entities.

sharedSkills.name: Angelic Channeling
sharedSkills.use: Call or carry divine force at risk.

sharedSkills.name: Interrogation
sharedSkills.use: Extract truth through pressure and reading contradictions.

sharedSkills.name: Psychological Profiling
sharedSkills.use: Predict behavior, motive, and escalation.

sharedSkills.name: Forensic Analysis
sharedSkills.use: Read physical evidence, wounds, residue, and scene logic.

sharedSkills.name: Medical Stabilization
sharedSkills.use: Keep someone alive or reduce injury pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Trap Engineering
sharedSkills.use: Design and deploy traps, snares, and killboxes.

sharedSkills.name: Vehicle Operation
sharedSkills.use: Drive, pursue, flee, or maneuver under pressure.

spells.name: Force Pulse
spells.effect: Push or stagger one target; break a charge or open a lane.
spells.backlash: You stagger; next roll -1. On heavy failure, rebound leaves you exposed.

spells.name: Veil Snap
spells.roll: Will + Ritual Basics or Presence Sense
spells.effect: Expose hidden spirit, broken glamour, hidden sigil, or host tell.
spells.backlash: Wrong reveal or false tell; heavy failure draws attention.

spells.name: Lantern Spark
spells.effect: Create occult light; remove 1 darkness setback in the zone.
spells.backlash: Spark dies, flares loudly, or exposes the group.

spells.name: Grave Chill
spells.effect: Impose -1 setback on one target's next physical action.
spells.backlash: Caster takes chill; -1 Endurance or Prowess.

spells.name: Shield Burst
spells.effect: Reduce one incoming damage tier or cancel one minor supernatural impact.
spells.backlash: Shield shatters; suffer recoil strain.

spells.name: Ash Mark
spells.effect: Tag target for tracking.
spells.backlash: Mark rebounds onto caster.

spells.name: Static Hex
spells.effect: Jam electronics, audio, or focus.
spells.backlash: Nearby gear glitches unpredictably.

spells.name: Spirit Lash
spells.effect: Deal direct occult harm to a manifested spirit.
spells.backlash: Pain echo; take -1 Will.

spells.name: Disruption
spells.roll: Will + Energy Control or Ritual Basics
spells.effect: Interrupt a weak manifestation, ability, or rite.
spells.backlash: Scatters focus or feeds the hostile effect.

spells.name: Energy Strike
spells.effect: Direct occult harm to a manifested entity or hostile ward.
spells.backlash: Backlash pain; affliction pressure or hostile attention spike.

spells.name: Burning Sigil
spells.effect: Mark target with sanctified burn; punishes infernal or fae movement.
spells.backlash: Wrong symbol or caster marked instead.

spells.name: Iron Vein
spells.effect: Give weapon, trap, or touch a brief anti-fae iron edge.
spells.backlash: Item heats, rejects charge, or becomes unstable.

spells.name: Anchor Step
spells.effect: Ignore forced movement, resist fear spike, or hold position in unstable ritual space.
spells.backlash: Lose movement or lock in place.

spells.name: Ward Flash
spells.effect: Repelling flare and brief safe space.
spells.backlash: Barrier breaks early or creates recoil.

spells.name: Silence Knot
spells.effect: Suppress whispers, chants, or sonic distraction.
spells.backlash: Silence rebounds or blocks allies at the wrong time.

spells.name: Presence Flare
spells.effect: Reveal nearby supernatural presence.
spells.backlash: Presence notices you back.

spells.name: Protective Circle
spells.effect: Create warded circle that blocks or slows spirits, minor demons, and unstable manifestations.
spells.backlash: Circle tears, traps wrong side, or creates false safety.

spells.name: Binding Chain Rite
spells.effect: Pin a manifested entity to a room, object, or marked position.
spells.backlash: Target lashes out or bind snaps onto wrong creature/item/Warden.

spells.name: Anchor Revelation
spells.effect: Learn broad nature of active anchor: remains, object, vessel, bargain token, shrine, or blood tie.
spells.backlash: False anchor clue, wasted time, or true anchor reacts.

spells.name: Name Calling
spells.effect: Compel named entity to answer, twitch, or reveal reaction to true/near-true name.
spells.backlash: Attention without leverage; retaliation or caller marked.

spells.name: Exorcist's Litany
spells.roll: Will + Ritual Casting + Spirit Communication or Occult Knowledge
spells.effect: Drive hostile possessor out of host without killing host first.
spells.backlash: Host convulses; backlash, extra rounds, escalation, or loss of control.

spells.name: Consecrate Ground
spells.effect: Sanctify room or site.
spells.backlash: Area flares unstable.

spells.name: Seal the Threshold
spells.effect: Close breach, gate, or layered path.
spells.backlash: Exit denial hits allies too.

spells.name: Curse Severance
spells.effect: Break active hex or knot.
spells.backlash: Curse jumps target.

spells.name: Ashen Burden
spells.effect: Target suffers -1 movement / pursuit.
spells.backlash: Mark stains you too.

spells.name: Black Thread
spells.effect: Track target by emotional pull.
spells.backlash: Target tracks you back.

spells.name: Hunger Bell
spells.effect: Agitate beast / wendigo / feeding urge.
spells.backlash: You feel it too.

spells.name: Saint's Breath
spells.effect: Ally ignores 1 fear setback.
spells.backlash: Calm turns to numbness.

spells.name: Hunter's Oath
spells.effect: One weapon gains anti-entity edge.
spells.backlash: Weapon burns hot in hand.

spells.name: Mercy Ward
spells.effect: Protect host/civilian from possession spike.
spells.backlash: Ward breaks under panic.

spells.name: Vessel Override
spells.effect: Seize control of shared host-body moment for one scene.
spells.backlash: Resident entity gains control, critical strain, GM control, or vessel fracture.

spells.name: Soul Pin
spells.effect: Nail spirit, demon, or escaping manifestation to its anchor for one final exchange.
spells.backlash: Part of target anchors in you/site; haunted/corrupted pressure.

spells.name: Black Gate Petition
spells.effect: Ask outer or infernal force for specific answer, location, or opening at terrible cost.
spells.backlash: The answer comes with a price, attention, or an opening that should not exist.

gear.name: Iron Knife
gear.effect: Basic damage; reliable field blade and anti-fae option.

gear.name: Silver Blade
gear.effect: Ignores or bypasses many supernatural resistances.

gear.name: Shotgun
gear.effect: High close-range damage and breach potential.

gear.name: Flashlight
gear.effect: Reduces darkness setbacks and can reveal certain entities.

gear.name: Holy Water
gear.effect: Damages or repels certain spirits and infernals.

gear.name: Salt Pack
gear.effect: Blocks entity movement or creates crossing denial.

gear.name: Fire Bomb
gear.effect: Area damage and cleansing; useful against fire weakness.
